name: Polaris International Holdings Inc.
summary: Polaris International Holdings Inc. operates as a mining and mineral exploration company. The company primarily explores for gold deposits. It holds interest in the Montana Project covering an area of 20 acres in the Nine Mile mining district in Montana. The company was formerly known as Modern World Media, Inc. and changed its name to Polaris International Holdings Inc. in September 2007. Polaris International Holdings Inc. was founded in 2001 and is based in Irving, Texas.
